message:
fix: Color quantization, overlong UTF-8, undo selection, and overflow bugs

- color.rs: Replace uniform-bin rgb_to_256 with nearest-neighbor cube_index
  matching against actual ANSI-256 levels [0, 95, 135, 175, 215, 255]
- sanitize.rs: Reject overlong UTF-8 encodings per RFC 3629 in decode_utf8_char
- stylesheet.rs: Guard extend() against self-deadlock with ptr::eq check
- editor.rs: Clear stale selection on undo/redo to prevent invalid state
- paragraph.rs: Use saturating_add in draw_x and align_x coordinate arithmetic
- list.rs: Use saturating_add for y-coordinate in item rendering
- grapheme_pool.rs: Use saturating_sub in len() to prevent underflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
